descriptors.name: amino_acid_composition
descriptors.label: Amino Acid Composition
descriptors.description: Fraction of each of the 20 standard amino acids in the sequence. Produces a 20-dimensional vector representing global amino acid usage.

descriptors.name: dipeptide_composition
descriptors.label: Dipeptide Composition
descriptors.description: Fraction of all possible dipeptide (two-residue) combinations (20²). Captures local sequential information between adjacent residues.

descriptors.name: tripeptide_composition
descriptors.label: Tripeptide Composition
descriptors.description: Fraction of all possible tripeptide (three-residue) combinations (20³). High-dimensional but rich in local context; may require dimensionality reduction.

descriptors.name: moreaubroto_autocorrelation
descriptors.label: Moran–Broto Autocorrelation
descriptors.description: Moreau–Broto autocorrelation based on physicochemical property scales. Measures the correlation between property values at residues separated by a given lag. Configurable: lag (default 30) and property scales.

descriptors.name: moran_autocorrelation
descriptors.label: Moran Autocorrelation
descriptors.description: Moran autocorrelation normalised variant. Measures the spatial correlation of a physicochemical property along the sequence at defined lag values. Configurable: lag and property scales.

descriptors.name: geary_autocorrelation
descriptors.label: Geary Autocorrelation
descriptors.description: Geary's C autocorrelation statistic. Sensitive to local variance in a physicochemical property at a given lag. Complements Moran autocorrelation. Configurable: lag and property scales.

descriptors.name: conjoint_triad
descriptors.label: Conjoint Triad
descriptors.description: Groups the 20 amino acids into 7 classes based on dipole and side-chain volume; counts all triplet class combinations (7³ = 343). Captures structural and electrostatic environment features.

descriptors.name: ctd
descriptors.label: CTD (Composition–Transition–Distribution)
descriptors.description: Encodes sequences via Composition (fraction in each class), Transition (frequency of adjacent class changes), and Distribution (position of the 1st, 25th, 50th, 75th and 100th percentile). Configurable: property (default hydrophobicity) and 'all' flag.

descriptors.name: ctd_composition
descriptors.label: CTD Composition
descriptors.description: Composition component of CTD: fraction of residues belonging to each of three physicochemical classes per property. Produces 3 features per property (21 total for all 7 properties with all_ctd=True). Configurable: property (default hydrophobicity) and 'all' flag.

descriptors.name: ctd_transition
descriptors.label: CTD Transition
descriptors.description: Transition component of CTD: frequency of adjacent transitions between the three physicochemical classes. Produces 3 features per property (21 total for all 7 properties with all_ctd=True). Configurable: property (default hydrophobicity) and 'all' flag.

descriptors.name: ctd_distribution
descriptors.label: CTD Distribution
descriptors.description: Distribution component of CTD: positions of the 1st, 25th, 50th, 75th, and last residue of each class as a percentage of sequence length. Produces 15 features per property (105 total for all 7 with all_ctd=True). Configurable: property (default hydrophobicity) and 'all' flag.

descriptors.name: sequence_order_coupling_number
descriptors.label: Sequence Order Coupling Number
descriptors.description: Captures sequence-order effects by computing correlation functions between residues at a given lag using a physicochemical distance matrix. Configurable: lag (default 30) and distance matrix.

descriptors.name: quasi_sequence_order
descriptors.label: Quasi-Sequence Order
descriptors.description: Extends amino acid composition with sequence-order coupling numbers. Balances composition-based and distance-based information. Configurable: lag, weight, and distance matrix.

descriptors.name: pseudo_amino_acid_composition
descriptors.label: Pseudo Amino Acid Composition (PseAAC)
descriptors.description: Augments amino acid composition with sequence-correlation factors derived from physicochemical properties, reducing information loss from pure composition. Configurable: λ (tier count, default 30), weight, and property scales.

descriptors.name: amphiphilic_pseudo_amino_acid_composition
descriptors.label: Amphiphilic PseAAC
descriptors.description: Variant of PseAAC that specifically incorporates hydrophobicity and hydrophilicity correlation factors, making it useful for membrane-active or amphiphilic peptides. Configurable: λ (default 30) and weight.

descriptors.name: gravy
descriptors.label: GRAVY (Grand Average Hydropathicity)
descriptors.description: Mean of the Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy values across all residues. A positive value indicates overall hydrophobicity; negative indicates hydrophilicity.

descriptors.name: aromaticity
descriptors.label: Aromaticity
descriptors.description: Fraction of aromatic residues (F, W, Y, H) in the sequence.

descriptors.name: instability_index
descriptors.label: Instability Index
descriptors.description: Stability classifier based on dipeptide instability weight values (DIWV). Values below 40 indicate a stable protein; 40 or above indicates instability.

descriptors.name: isoelectric_point
descriptors.label: Isoelectric Point
descriptors.description: Estimated pH at which the protein carries no net charge, calculated iteratively using standard pKa values for ionisable residues.

descriptors.name: molecular_weight
descriptors.label: Molecular Weight
descriptors.description: Average molecular weight of the protein calculated from residue masses, corrected for water lost at each peptide bond.

descriptors.name: charge_distribution
descriptors.label: Charge Distribution
descriptors.description: Positive, negative, and net charge of ionisable residues at a given pH using the Henderson-Hasselbalch equation. Configurable: ph (default 7.4).

descriptors.name: hydrophobic_polar_charged_composition
descriptors.label: Hydrophobic/Polar/Charged Composition
descriptors.description: Percentage of residues in each of three physicochemical groups: hydrophobic (A, C, F, I, L, M, V, W, Y), polar (G, N, Q, S, T), and charged (D, E, H, K, R).

descriptors.name: secondary_structure_propensity
descriptors.label: Secondary Structure Propensity
descriptors.description: Average Chou-Fasman propensity values for alpha-helix, beta-sheet, and random coil conformations across all residues.

descriptors.name: kmer_composition
descriptors.label: k-mer Composition
descriptors.description: Frequency of all possible k-length residue subsequences as a percentage of total k-mers. Produces 20^k features (400 at default k=2). Configurable: k (default 2).

descriptors.name: reduced_alphabet_composition
descriptors.label: Reduced Alphabet Composition
descriptors.description: Amino acid composition after mapping residues to a reduced alphabet of physicochemical groups. Supported alphabet sizes: 2, 3, 4, 6. Configurable: alphabet_size (default 6).

descriptors.name: motif_composition
descriptors.label: Motif Composition
descriptors.description: Count of occurrences of 8 built-in biological sequence motifs (e.g. N-linked glycosylation, RGD integrin, zinc-finger CxxC, PEST degradation signal). Returns 8 features using the default built-in motif set.

descriptors.name: amino_acid_pair_composition
descriptors.label: Amino Acid Pair Composition
descriptors.description: Frequency of all 400 residue-pair combinations with column names annotated by the physicochemical class of each residue (Hydrophobic, Polar, Charged, or Other).

descriptors.name: aliphatic_index
descriptors.label: Aliphatic Index
descriptors.description: Relative volume occupied by aliphatic side chains (Ala, Val, Ile, Leu). Higher values indicate greater thermostability. Formula: AI = Ala% + 2.9×Val% + 3.9×(Ile%+Leu%).

descriptors.name: extinction_coefficient
descriptors.label: Extinction Coefficient
descriptors.description: Molar extinction coefficient at 280 nm from Trp (W), Tyr (Y), and Cys (C) residues. Reported for both reduced (no disulfide bonds) and oxidised (all Cys paired) states.

descriptors.name: boman_index
descriptors.label: Boman Index
descriptors.description: Sum of solubility values for amino acids divided by sequence length, predicting potential for protein–protein interactions. Positive values suggest membrane-binding or interaction potential.

descriptors.name: aggregation_propensity
descriptors.label: Aggregation Propensity
descriptors.description: Estimates aggregation-prone regions via a sliding-window approach combining Kyte-Doolittle hydrophobicity and charge neutrality. Returns count of qualifying windows and the fraction of the sequence covered.

descriptors.name: hydrophobic_moment
descriptors.label: Hydrophobic Moment
descriptors.description: Mean and maximum hydrophobic moment across sliding windows using the Eisenberg hydrophobicity scale and a helical-wheel projection. Captures amphipathicity of putative helix segments. Configurable: window (default 11), angle in degrees (default 100 for α-helix).

descriptors.name: shannon_entropy
descriptors.label: Shannon Entropy
descriptors.description: Information-theoretic measure of amino acid diversity. Computed as H = -Σ p_i log₂(p_i) where p_i is the fractional frequency of each amino acid type present. Range: 0 (single residue type) to ~4.32 bits (uniform).
